calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Catherine Yee, Esq., for Mimi M.F. Lee, Administrator.

At the query of the court, counsel offers testimony in response to the court's tentative ruling and to clarify the percentages of interest of the estate's real property held by each of the beneficiaries. Counsel advises that numerous consents to the proposed distribution have been filed.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
